chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P. No. D-2576 of 2020 C.P. No. D-3167 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ HEARING OF CASE. 1. For order on CMA No. 13410 of 2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 10.03.2026. Mr. Muhammad Aqil Awan, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Khalid Mahmood Siddiqui, Advocate for Respondents. Ms. Wajeeha Mehdi, DAG. --------------- Let this matter be placed before the Head of the Constitutional Bench for appropriate Orders, in terms of the decision of the Hon’ble Supreme Court, and to assign this matter to another Bench for hearing of the matter, as he deems fit and proper, as one of the member of this bench has already opined in the matter, in earlier round of litigation. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
